title: Reject Request Brief grounded only in working planning view
summary: This Request Brief remains contract-valid but should fail closed because it does not anchor on an accepted planning baseline.

lineage.rationale: The bounded planning flow must reject working-only planning refs for approved Task Packet generation.

work_object_refs.notes: The target work object is still only in working state.

planning_record_refs.notes: The flow should reject a Request Brief that only references the working planning view.

evidence.summary: R3-005 requires fail-closed handling for under-evidenced planning inputs.

audit.notes: This fixture is reserved for fail-closed flow testing only.

request_intent: Attempt Task Packet generation from a working-only planning baseline.
requested_outcome: Demonstrate that the bounded planning flow requires an accepted planning baseline before it emits an approved Task Packet.
operator_questions: Does the planning flow reject Request Briefs that only reference working planning state?
